transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-08-10]
[00:00] You: Company OKR planning session for Q4. We have all department heads here. Let's set our objectives and key results.
[00:55] Speaker 1: Sales OKR proposal: Objective — reach $1.5M in new ARR. Key Results: close 5 enterprise deals, grow mid-market pipeline by 30%, hit 110% of quota. I'll finalize the sales OKR doc by August 14th.
[01:50] Speaker 2: Engineering OKR: Objective — ship 3 major features with 99.9% uptime. Key Results: zero P0 incidents, 95% test coverage, reduce deploy time to under 10 minutes. I'll put together the engineering OKR with milestones by August 14th.
[02:40] Speaker 3: Design OKR: Objective — achieve design system 100% adoption across products. Key Results: migrate 3 legacy products, increase design-dev handoff satisfaction score to 4.5/5. I'll have the design OKR documented by August 13th.
[03:25] Speaker 4: Data OKR: Objective — deliver real-time analytics to all enterprise customers. Key Results: < 5 second data freshness, 99% pipeline reliability. I'll write up the data OKR with technical milestones by August 15th.
[04:10] Speaker 5: Marketing OKR: Objective — 2x qualified pipeline generation. Key Results: 500 MQLs, 30% MQL-to-SQL conversion, launch 3 new campaigns. I'll have marketing OKR finalized by August 14th.
[04:55] Speaker 6: Customer Success OKR: Objective — achieve 95% gross retention. Key Results: NPS above 50, reduce churn to < 2%, onboard 20 enterprise accounts to new tier. I'll document the CS OKR by August 15th.
[05:40] You: Good. I'll compile all OKRs into the company OKR doc by August 17th and share with the board before the August 20th board meeting.

action_items.description: Finalize and document sales OKR with milestones
action_items.source_quote: I'll finalize the sales OKR doc by August 14th.
I'll put together the engineering OKR with milestones by August 14th.
I'll have the design OKR documented by August 13th.

action_items.description: Write data OKR with technical milestones
action_items.source_quote: I'll write up the data OKR with technical milestones by August 15th.
I'll have marketing OKR finalized by August 14th.
I'll document the CS OKR by August 15th.

action_items.description: Compile all department OKRs into company OKR document and share with board
action_items.source_quote: I'll compile all OKRs into the company OKR doc by August 17th and share with the board before the August 20th board meeting.

decisions: Q4 Sales OKR: reach $1.5M new ARR
Q4 Engineering OKR: ship 3 major features with 99.9% uptime
Q4 Customer Success OKR: 95% gross retention with NPS above 50
